Know Who I AM

Hi everyone! I'm Cuong Phung Thai (Eddie) from Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam.
I'm a Fintech Researcher and Startup Founder, currently leading nOps Labs and Bep Ink.
I'm currently pursuing a degree in Financial Technology at University of Economics Ho Chi Minh City (UEH).

Beyond building startups and research, I enjoy:

  • Building AI Agents & Automation
  • AI Video Generation & Styling
  • Self-directed learning & inflation hedging

"Combines research-grade data thinking with the hands-on instinct to actually ship."

EDDIE

The Formula

40%Hate for wasting time
+
30%Love for winning
+
20%Fun and discovery
+
10%Do it now
=
Eddie
